title: feat: support using client param in constructor elasticsearchvector

relatedIssues.title: [FEATURE] Support using ElasticSearchVector with a custom client

summary: Adds an optional `client` parameter to the ElasticSearchVector constructor so users can pass a pre-configured @elastic/elasticsearch Client instance instead of only a URL. If `client` is provided, it is used directly; if neither `client` nor `url` is provided, a MastraError is thrown. Includes 3 constructor tests (error case, URL init, client init). Addresses issue #11536 which requests this for Bun compatibility (HttpConnection workaround) and general client configurability.
maintainerNotes: Good community contribution addressing a legitimate feature request. The PR has merge conflicts due to PR #13740 (merged 2026-03-03) which added user-agent tracking headers to the ES client constructor in the same area. Author needs to: (1) rebase onto main to resolve conflicts and incorporate the new `name`/`headers` fields from #13740 into the URL-based construction path, (2) add a changeset. The approach is sound — when a user passes their own client, they control its configuration, so the user-agent header from #13740 would not apply (acceptable tradeoff). No human reviews yet; CodeRabbit left automated comments. CI checks are stuck in pending state (likely needs rebase to retrigger).
